name: Field of Greens Wilted Spinach w/ Lemon and Pine Nuts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 to 2 cloves garlic, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Sort through the spinach, discarding stems and bruised or yellow leaves.
2. Wash the spinach in plenty of cold water. If sandy, wash a second time, then spin dry (or dry on paper towel; any water left on the leaves will help it wilt quickly).
3. Heat the olive oil in a large sauté pan over medium heat.
4. Add the garlic and lemon juice. Sauté for 1 minute.
5. Increase the heat to high. Add the spinach, salt (to taste), and pepper (to taste). Wilt the spinach by tossing with tongs to coat the leaves with hot oil and garlic.
6. Toss in the pine nuts. Season with more salt and pepper if desired.
7. Serve immediately.
To toast pine nuts:
- Keep an eye on the pan as they can burn quickly.
- Place the nuts in a dry skillet and toast them over very low heat, stirring or shaking the pan as needed until golden and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
